summary: Completed comprehensive testing of trading model dashboard for micro futures (MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K). All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with predictive and confirmatory indicators, confluence/confidence scoring, and multi-timeframe analysis.

design_issues.issue: Minor telemetry request failure (net::ERR_ABORTED) for TradingView analytics - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend API /api/health returns healthy status
Backend API /api/symbols returns all 4 symbols (MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K)
Backend API /api/analyze returns confluence and confidence scores
Backend API /api/signals/{symbol} returns trading signals
Backend API /api/backtest runs backtest and returns results
Backend API /api/market-data returns OHLCV data
Frontend loads with asset selection sidebar
Frontend shows confluence score with threshold indicator (60%)
Frontend shows confidence score with threshold indicator (50%)
Frontend displays all predictive indicators (RSI, MACD, EMA, Bollinger, Stochastic, ADX, ATR)
Frontend displays all confirmatory indicators (Volume, OBV, VWAP, GAMMA, VIX)
Frontend shows MTF confluence section with signal strength
Frontend timeframe selection works (4H, 1H, 5M)
Frontend asset selection works (clicking symbols updates data)
Frontend refresh analysis button works
Frontend backtest functionality works with results display
Frontend indicator expansion/collapse works
Frontend real-time data updates work
TradingView chart integration works
Loading overlays and error handling work
